title: Offline Pass
description: Cryptographically signed pass authorizing offline service sessions with spending and usage constraints

passId.description: Unique identifier for this offline pass

sub.description: User subject identifier the pass is issued to

deviceId.description: Device this pass is bound to

policyVersion.description: Version of the offline policy used to generate this pass

revocationEpoch.description: Revocation epoch; stations reject passes with epoch lower than their stored minimum

offlineAllowance.description: Spending and usage limits for this offline pass

maxTotalCredits.description: Maximum total credits that can be spent across all offline transactions

maxUses.description: Maximum number of offline transactions allowed

maxCreditsPerTx.description: Maximum credits per single offline transaction

allowedServiceTypes.description: Service types permitted for offline use

minIntervalSec.description: Minimum interval in seconds between consecutive offline transactions

stationOfflineWindowHours.description: Maximum hours a station can operate in offline mode

stationMaxOfflineTx.description: Maximum offline transactions a station will accept before requiring sync

signatureAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used to sign the offline pass

signature.description: ECDSA P-256 base64-encoded signature over the pass fields
